nodes.label: Machine vs Printed CLI
nodes.rationale: Default to machine changes; only fix printed CLI directly when genuinely API-specific. Don't change machine for one CLI's edge case.

nodes.label: Absorb and Transcend
nodes.rationale: GOAT CLI absorbs every good idea from competing tools/plugins, adds offline SQLite, agent-native output. Layer 1 absorb, Layer 2 transcend with compound commands.

nodes.label: Non-Obvious Insight NOI
nodes.rationale: One-sentence reframe of what an API is really for. Drives power-user commands. Phase 0 cannot complete without one.

nodes.label: Creativity Ladder
nodes.rationale: 5 rungs: API wrappers, output formatting, local persistence (SQLite/sync), domain analytics, behavioral insights. Most CLIs stop at rung 1.

nodes.label: Agent-Native Surface
nodes.rationale: Every printed CLI exposes CLI surface for humans and MCP surface for agents. Runtime walker mirrors Cobra tree as MCP tools.

nodes.label: Anti-Reimplementation Rule
nodes.rationale: Printed CLI wraps an API, does not replace it. Reject hand-rolled response builders, stubs, local aggregations, synthesized enums.

nodes.label: Two-Tier Scorecard
nodes.rationale: 100 points split 50/50: Infrastructure (output modes, auth, errors, agent-native) + Domain correctness (path validity, auth protocol, data pipeline, type fidelity). Grade A = 85+.

nodes.label: Quality Gates
nodes.rationale: 8 gates: go mod tidy, govulncheck, go vet, go build, binary build, --help, version, doctor.

nodes.label: Domain Archetypes
nodes.rationale: Profiler classifies API into project-management, communication, payments, infrastructure, content. Auto-generates workflow + insight commands per archetype.

nodes.label: Code and Comment Hygiene Rules
nodes.rationale: No speculative future-proofing in comments. No dates/tickets in code. Categorical strings -> typed const. Single-case switch -> ||.

nodes.label: Publishing Skill Rule
nodes.rationale: Only supported publish path is /printing-press-publish skill. Do not bypass with manual gh/git commands.

nodes.label: Conventional Commit Style
nodes.rationale: type(scope): description. Scopes: cli, skills, ci, main. Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, chore, test. Breaking changes use ! after scope.

nodes.label: Golden Output Harness
nodes.rationale: Deterministic offline command outputs compared against committed fixtures. scripts/golden.sh verify. Never update goldens just to pass.

nodes.label: Auth Error Handling in Generated CLIs
Absorb & Transcend Philosophy
nodes.doc: GOAT CLI = everything everyone else does + everything nobody else thought of. Two-layer model: Layer 1 Absorb (every MCP/skill/CLI feature matched & beaten) + Layer 2 Transcend (compound use cases requiring local SQLite/offline/analytics).

nodes.label: Minority-Side Auth Annotation
nodes.doc: MCP tool descriptions only annotated when CLI has mixed public/auth-required endpoints. Annotate minority side only. All same -> none. Mixed public minority -> '(public)'. Mixed auth minority -> '(requires API key/auth/browser login)'.

nodes.label: Runstate Isolation Model
nodes.doc: Three-part storage: .runstate for active mutable state, library/ for published immutable CLIs, manuscripts/ for archived research/proofs. .runstate is sole resume/discovery source.

nodes.label: Checkout Scope
nodes.doc: Active runstate isolated per git checkout via sanitized repo basename + short hash suffix. Prevents worktree cross-contamination.

nodes.label: GOAT CLI Definition
nodes.doc: The greatest of all time CLI. Build THE GOAT, not an alternative. Absorb every feature from every competing tool, then transcend with NOI commands.

nodes.label: Non-Obvious Insight (NOI)
nodes.doc: Compound use cases only possible with local data layer and cross-entity analysis. Example: 'bottleneck' (which issues block most others), 'velocity' (team speed trends). 12 transcendence commands beat 300 API-wrapping commands.

nodes.label: Phase 1.5 Ecosystem Absorb Gate
nodes.doc: Mandatory stop gate between Research Brief and Generate. Catalogs every feature from every MCP/server/CLI/script. Produces absorb manifest table (feature|source|impl|value). Waits for user approval before generating.

nodes.label: Two-Phase Parser Detection
nodes.doc: detectRequiredHeaders extended to return both global RequiredHeaders and per-path value map. mapResources reads per-path map to set Endpoint.HeaderOverrides where values differ from global.

nodes.label: Fourth-Tier Auth Inference
nodes.doc: After securitySchemes, query-param, and description tiers fail, parser scans operation-level Authorization header params. >30% threshold. Inferred Bearer/Basic auth.

nodes.label: Deterministic Dead-Code Removal
nodes.doc: Replace unreliable LLM instructions with binary pass. Go AST parser surgically removes dead functions. Safety net via go build restore on false positives.

nodes.label: MCP Readiness Level
nodes.doc: full (none/api_key/bearer auth), partial (cookie/composed with some public endpoints), cli-only (all endpoints need cookie/composed, none public). Determines marketplace listing eligibility.

nodes.label: Agent Decomposition Hybrid Model
nodes.doc: Keep SKILL.md as orchestrator (~150 lines). Extract 3 agents: research-agent (Phase 1+1.5), builder-agent (Phase 3), verifier-agent (Phase 4+4.9). Deferred until skill exceeds 600 lines or context pollution degrades build quality.

nodes.label: Post-Parse NoAuth Sweep
nodes.doc: When Auth.Type == 'none' && !Auth.Inferred, all endpoints get NoAuth = true. Guarded by Inferred flag to avoid false positives from specs that merely omit security declarations.

nodes.label: Browser Cookie Auth Pipeline
nodes.doc: Sniff-to-CLI runtime for cookie-authenticated APIs. Sniff validates Chrome cookies produce authenticated responses. CLI has auth login --chrome that shells out to cookie tool (pycookiecheat/barnardb/cookie-scoop). Cookies saved to config, not re-read per request.

nodes.label: -pp- Infix Naming Convention
nodes.doc: MCP binaries named {name}-pp-mcp (matching CLI's {name}-pp-cli). Prevents vendor collisions in marketplaces. Rename done before any listings exist.

nodes.label: Smithery Marketplace Metadata
nodes.doc: smithery.yaml generated at publish time alongside .printing-press.json. Contains binary name, description, start command, env vars. Only written for full/partial readiness CLIs.

nodes.label: MCP About Tool
nodes.doc: Every MCP server has self-describing about tool returning API identity, auth requirements, tool count, transcendence features. Works even without auth configured.

nodes.label: Absorb Feature Manifest
nodes.doc: Table format: feature | best source | our implementation | added value. Every row = required CLI feature. Produced during Phase 1.5, consumed by Phase 3 build priorities.

nodes.label: Printing Press Mega MCP
nodes.doc: Step 2 plan (deferred). Single MCP aggregating all library CLIs. Catalog tools (library_search/info/install) + passthrough tools under namespaced names.

nodes.label: Runstate Directory Layout
nodes.doc: .runstate/<scope>/current/<api>.json | runs/<run-id>/{state.json,working/<api>-pp-cli/,research/,proofs/,pipeline/,manifest.json}

nodes.label: GOAT Scoring Alignment
nodes.doc: Research plan evaluating whether agent scoring maps to GOAT qualities. Sources include AGENTS.md, printing-press requirements, goat-centered scoring criteria.

nodes.label: Adaptive Rate Limiting
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. Auto-detects API rate limits and adjusts request timing dynamically.

nodes.label: Publish Skill
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. /printing-press-publish skill for adding CLIs to public library. Preflight checks, manifest validation, fork/branch/PR automation.

nodes.label: Sniff Gate Auto-Install
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. Automated dependency installation during sniff gate phase.

nodes.label: Post-Gen Publish Offer
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. After generation, user offered option to publish to library.

nodes.label: Regenerate/Replace Flow
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. Support for regenerating and replacing existing CLI outputs.

nodes.label: Crowd-Sniff
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. Multi-source sniff pipeline aggregating signals from browser, docs, and community sources.

nodes.label: Proxy-Envelope Client Pattern
nodes.doc: 2026-03-29. Client wrapping pattern for intercepting and modifying HTTP requests/responses.

nodes.label: Codex Mode Token Overhaul
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Optimized token usage for codex delegation mode.

nodes.label: Discovery Manuscript Provenance
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Tracking origin and chain of custody for discovered API specifications.

nodes.label: Publish Name Collision Handling
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Deduplicated directory claiming for library/ when publishing CLIs with same name.

nodes.label: README Source Credits
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Generated README includes attribution to source tools/specifications.

nodes.label: Crowd-Sniff Parameter Discovery
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Enhanced parameter extraction from crowd-sourced API traffic.

nodes.label: Generator Retro Improvements
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Template and generator fixes from Steam retro learnings.

nodes.label: README Comprehensive Rewrite
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Complete rewrite of README template with better structure and agent-native positioning.

nodes.label: Auto-Brainstorm Before Absorb Gate
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Automated brainstorming phase runs before ecosystem absorb gate to generate transcendence candidates early.

nodes.label: Printing Press Polish Skill
nodes.doc: 2026-03-30. Skill for post-generation polishing: dead code removal, formatting, quality fixes.

nodes.label: Auth Envvar Hint Relevance Filter
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Filter irrelevant auth env var hints from generated CLI output.

nodes.label: Runstate Isolation + Heartbeat Lock
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Per-skill runstate isolation and heartbeat-based lock mechanism to prevent concurrent run corruption.

nodes.label: API Reachability Gate
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Pre-generation check verifying target API is reachable before starting pipeline.

nodes.label: Auth Error Handling Improvements
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Better error messages and recovery paths for auth failures in generated CLIs.

nodes.label: Sniff Session Transfer Daemon Fix
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Fix lifecycle management of session transfer daemon during sniff capture.

nodes.label: Steam Retro Improvements
nodes.doc: 2026-03-31. Multiple fixes from Steam run retros including dead code, auth, and template quality.

nodes.label: Scorer Behavioral Detection
nodes.doc: 2026-04-01. Enhanced scorer detecting reimplementation patterns and agent behavior violations.

nodes.label: Generator Pipeline Improvements
nodes.doc: 2026-04-01. Pipeline fixes for template rendering, spec parsing, and output generation.

nodes.label: Machine Context Compensation
nodes.doc: 2026-04-01. Generator adapts output based on detected machine/OS context differences.

nodes.label: Deterministic Dead-Code Removal
nodes.doc: 2026-04-01. printing-press polish --remove-dead-code using Go AST. Replaces unreliable LLM instructions.

nodes.label: README Source Credits (redux)
nodes.doc: 2026-04-01. Second pass at README source attribution with improved format and coverage.

nodes.label: Browser Cookie Auth Runtime
nodes.doc: 2026-04-02. Sniff-to-CLI cookie auth pipeline: auth login --chrome, cookie tool detection, session validation, doctor checks.

nodes.label: Sniff Auth + GraphQL BFF + Naming Fixes
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Combined fix for sniff auth detection, GraphQL BFF endpoint handling, and naming consistency.

nodes.label: Composed Cookie Auth
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Multi-step cookie auth composition for APIs requiring multiple cookies or pre-request setup.

nodes.label: Scorer Pagination/Proxy-Routes Fix
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Fix scorer handling of paginated endpoints and proxy-routed API patterns.

nodes.label: Data-Source Resolution
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Improved spec source resolution for multi-source API definitions.

nodes.label: Verify Live Smoke Tests
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Integration of live endpoint smoke tests into the verify pipeline.

nodes.label: Sync Path Resolution Fix
nodes.doc: 2026-04-03. Fix sync command path resolution for nested resource commands.

nodes.label: Hide Raw Commands + API Discovery
nodes.doc: 2026-04-04. Hide internal/raw commands from help output. Add API discovery surface.

nodes.label: Required API Header Detection
nodes.doc: 2026-04-04. Parser detects required headers from OpenAPI parameters, emits them to CLI.

nodes.label: Deep Layered Verification
nodes.doc: 2026-04-04. Multi-layer verification: compile, vet, score, smoke, MCP readiness.

nodes.label: Generator Dry-Run/Imports/Types Fix
nodes.doc: 2026-04-04. Fix dry-run output, import paths, and type generation in templates.

nodes.label: MCP Readiness Layer
nodes.doc: 2026-04-05. Per-endpoint NoAuth detection, MCP metadata in manifest+registry, about tool, smithery.yaml, scorecard MCP reporting. Step 1 of 2 toward Mega MCP.

nodes.label: Public Retro Skill
nodes.doc: 2026-04-05. Skill for running public retros and publishing findings.

nodes.label: Per-Endpoint Headers + Auth Param Inference
nodes.doc: 2026-04-05. Per-endpoint version header routing + 4th-tier auth inference from Authorization header params. From Cal.com run2 retro findings F1, F4.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/paths.go
nodes.doc: Path derivation for press-home, scope, runstate, library, manuscript. Centralizes storage contract.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/state.go
nodes.doc: Pipeline state management. Extended with RunID, Scope, runstate directories. Saves to .runstate/<scope>/runs/<run-id>/state.json.

nodes.label: internal/openapi/parser.go
nodes.doc: OpenAPI 3.0 parser. Extended with per-endpoint NoAuth detection, per-endpoint header overrides, 4th-tier auth inference.

nodes.label: internal/generator/generator.go
nodes.doc: Template engine. Extended with mcpDescription function, naming.MCP(), auth_browser template selection, header override plumbing.

nodes.label: internal/spec/spec.go
nodes.doc: Spec data model. Extended with Endpoint.NoAuth, Endpoint.HeaderOverrides, AuthConfig.CookieDomain.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/climanifest.go
nodes.doc: CLI manifest schema. Extended with MCPBinary, MCPToolCount, MCPPublicToolCount, MCPReady, AuthEnvVars.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/scorecard.go
nodes.doc: Scorecard. Extended with informational MCP tool split reporting. security parsing at line 1113.

nodes.label: skills/printing-press/SKILL.md
nodes.doc: Main skill definition. v2.0.0 at 435 lines. Extended with Phase 1.5, browser auth section, absorb/transcend rules.

nodes.label: skills/printing-press-publish/SKILL.md
nodes.doc: Publish skill. Extended with MCP registry fields and smithery.yaml generation.

nodes.label: internal/naming/naming.go
nodes.doc: Naming utilities. Extended with MCP() function returning {name}-pp-mcp.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/mcp_tools.go.tmpl
nodes.doc: MCP tools template. Extended with mcpDescription auth annotations and about tool registration.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/auth_browser.go.tmpl
nodes.doc: New template for cookie-auth CLIs: auth login --chrome, auth status, auth logout.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/client.go.tmpl
nodes.doc: Client template. Extended with per-request header override support via optional headers map parameter.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/command_endpoint.go.tmpl
nodes.doc: Command template. Extended with HeaderOverrides conditional block for per-endpoint header routing.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/readme.md.tmpl
nodes.doc: README template. Extended with MCP server install section and cookie auth Quick Start.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/main_mcp.go.tmpl
nodes.doc: MCP main template. Server name updated for -pp- infix convention.

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/makefile.tmpl

nodes.label: internal/generator/templates/goreleaser.yaml.tmpl

nodes.label: internal/cli/polish.go
nodes.doc: New CLI command: printing-press polish --remove-dead-code. Uses AST-based function removal.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/polish.go
nodes.doc: Pipeline function for dead-code removal. Orchestrates dogfood detection -> AST removal -> go build safety net.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/publish.go
nodes.doc: Publish pipeline. Extended with writeCLIManifestForPublish, smithery.yaml generation, manifest MCP fields.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/dogfood.go
nodes.doc: Dogfood detection. checkDeadFunctions at line 420 returns dead function names. Used by polish for removal.

nodes.label: skills/printing-press/references/sniff-capture.md
nodes.doc: Sniff capture reference. Extended with Step 2d cookie auth validation.

nodes.label: internal/cli/root.go
nodes.doc: CLI entry point. Extended with GenerateManifestParams.Spec field, MCP metadata plumbing.

nodes.label: internal/pipeline/lock.go
nodes.doc: Run locking. PromoteWorkingCLI extended with manifest MCP fields and smithery.yaml.

nodes.label: internal/cli/vision.go
nodes.doc: Vision command. Updated for runstate-aware output paths.

nodes.label: internal/cli/emboss.go
nodes.doc: Emboss command. Updated to treat published library dirs as immutable input, copying to runstate working dir before modification.

nodes.label: MCP Server Generation Pattern
nodes.doc: Every printed CLI ships both CLI binary and MCP server binary. MCP server mirrors CLI commands as MCP tools via runtime walker. Two surfaces: CLI for humans, MCP for agents.

nodes.label: Dogfood Detection -> Binary Fix Loop
nodes.doc: Determine what's dead/broken via dogfood, then fix it with a deterministic binary pass. Pattern for moving quality enforcement from LLM instructions to code.

nodes.label: Reference File Pattern
nodes.doc: Skills reference external files (sniff-capture.md, absorb-scoring.md) for detailed instructions. Keeps SKILL.md focused on orchestration.

nodes.label: Tiered Auth Inference Pattern
nodes.doc: 4 tiers: securitySchemes -> query param -> description -> header param. Each tier only runs when prior returns 'none'. New tiers added without weakening existing thresholds.

nodes.label: Absorb Manifest as Requirements Contract
nodes.doc: Feature manifest drives build priorities. Every row = required feature. Prevents LLM from skipping features during generation. Replaces 'top 3-5 workflows' with full manifest.

nodes.label: Cal.com API
nodes.doc: Source of findings F1 (per-endpoint version headers) and F4 (auth from header params). Per-resource versioning pattern.

nodes.label: Steam Web API
nodes.doc: 164 tools. Origin of multiple retro findings: dead code, auth inference, query-param auth precedent.

nodes.label: Pagliacci Pizza API
nodes.doc: 41 tools, composed cookie auth. Used as test case for MCP readiness partial mode with public endpoints.

nodes.label: Linear MCP
nodes.doc: 21 MCP tools. Official MCP server. Key absorb target for feature comparison.

nodes.label: PagerDuty MCP
nodes.doc: 60+ MCP tools. Most comprehensive MCP analyzed. CLI angle is purely SQLite analytics.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Code Mode
nodes.doc: 2,500 endpoints through 2 MCP tools. Proved CLI would have been wasted without landscape gate.

nodes.label: Stripe MCP
nodes.doc: 25 MCP tools. Example absorb target for payment API CLI generation.

nodes.label: Cal.com Run 2 Retro
nodes.doc: Origin document for per-endpoint header routing and auth header param inference (findings F1, F4).

nodes.label: Steam Run 5 Retro
nodes.doc: Origin document for deterministic dead-code removal. Found dead code in every generated CLI across 5 runs.
